# Salt Creek Advisory

> Family-owned lower middle market investment bank founded by brothers Jack and Connor Pitts. Sell-side and buy-side M&A advisory for business owners with roughly $5M-$75M in revenue ($1M-$5M EBITDA), with sector depth in early childhood education, business services, and industrials. Based in Chicago, Illinois, serving owners nationally.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://saltcreekadvisory.com/index.html): firm overview and positioning
- [About](https://saltcreekadvisory.com/about.html): founding story of Jack and Connor Pitts
- [Team](https://saltcreekadvisory.com/team.html): principal bios and backgrounds
- [Capabilities](https://saltcreekadvisory.com/capabilities.html): sell-side, buy-side, valuation, and advisory services
- [Sectors](https://saltcreekadvisory.com/sectors.html): early childhood education, business services, industrials
- [Process](https://saltcreekadvisory.com/process.html): the sell-side M&A process end to end
- [Valuation tool](https://saltcreekadvisory.com/valuation.html): free business valuation estimate
- [FAQ](https://saltcreekadvisory.com/faq.html): direct answers on valuation, timing, fees, confidentiality
- [Investors](https://saltcreekadvisory.com/investors.html): buy-side mandates for PE firms, family offices, strategic acquirers
- [Articles](https://saltcreekadvisory.com/articles.html): guides on choosing an advisor, valuation, buyer types, and the sale process
